# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

Currently, only the latest on `main` branch is supported with security updates.

## Reporting a Vulnerability

To report a vulnerability, open a new issue or send me an email to [security@mail.cukito.tech](mailto:security@mail.cukito.tech?subject=Report%20a%20vulneravility&body=Please%20provide%20the%20following%20details%20to%20help%20us%20address%20the%20issue%20effectively%3A%0D%0A%0D%0A1.%20**Description**%3A%20Provide%20a%20clear%20and%20concise%20description%20of%20the%20vulnerability.%0D%0A2.%20**Steps%20to%20Reproduce**%3A%20Include%20detailed%20steps%20to%20reproduce%20the%20issue.%0D%0A3.%20**Impact**%3A%20Describe%20the%20potential%20impact%20of%20the%20vulnerability.%0D%0A4.%20**Environment**%3A%20Specify%20the%20environment%20where%20the%20issue%20was%20found%20(e.g.%2C%20OS%2C%20browser%2C%20app%20version).%0D%0A5.%20**Attachments**%3A%20Attach%20any%20relevant%20files%2C%20screenshots%2C%20or%20logs%20that%20can%20help%20us%20investigate.%0D%0A%0D%0AThank%20you%20for%20helping%20us%20improve%20the%20security%20of%20our%20platform.).
